name: Place GTT Order
summary: Places a GTT (Good Till Triggered) alert/order via a POST call. The request sends a jData JSON object (order/alert parameters) plus the login jKey; on success it returns an alert id (al_id / Al_id) and a request_time.

request_params.name: jData
request_params.description: Should send json object with fields in below list.

json_fields.name: uid
json_fields.description: User id of the logged in user.

json_fields.name: d
json_fields.description: Data to be compared with LTP.

json_fields.name: remarks
json_fields.description: Any message Entered during order entry.

json_fields.name: trantype
json_fields.description: B -> BUY, S -> SELL [transtype should be 'B' or 'S' else reject].

json_fields.name: ret
json_fields.description: Retention type [ret should be DAY / EOS / IOC else reject].

json_fields.name: qty
json_fields.description: Order Quantity [If qty is junk value other than numbers].

json_fields.name: prc
json_fields.description: Order Price [If prc is junk value other than numbers] "Order price cannot be zero".

json_fields.name: dscqty
json_fields.description: Disclosed quantity (Max 10% for NSE, and 50% for MCX) [If dscqty is junk value other than numbers].

response_fields.name: stat
response_fields.description: GTT order success or failure indication.

response_fields.name: request_time
response_fields.description: This will be present only in a successful response.

response_fields.name: al_id
response_fields.description: Alert Id (returned as "Al_id" in the sample success response).

response_fields.name: emsg
response_fields.description: This will be present only in case of errors. That is : 1) Invalid Input 2) Session Expired.

notes:
- jData and jKey are sent as URL/form parameters (jData={...}&jKey=...), with the JSON object passed as the value of jData. The curl uses a placeholder BaseURL; the real base URL is https://piconnect.flattrade.in/PiConnectAPI/.
- The json fields table spans pages 30-31: uid/tsym/exch/ai_t are on page 30; validity/d/remarks/trantype/prctyp/prd/ret/actid/qty/prc/dscqty are on page 31.
- 'd' (Data to be compared with LTP) is the only optional json field (no '*' in the source table); all other listed fields are marked required.
- 'prctyp' has only a Possible value cell (LMT / SL-LMT / DS / 2L / 3L) and NO description text in the source table.
- 'ai_t' (Alert Type) has no Possible value cell in the source table.
- Validity possible values per the table are DAY or GTT (the sample curl uses "DAY").
- prd (product) possible values: C / M / H. ret (retention) must be DAY / EOS / IOC else rejected. trantype must be 'B' or 'S' else rejected.
- Disclosed quantity (dscqty) max is 10% for NSE and 50% for MCX.
- The sample curl body includes an extra field "prevprd": "C" that is NOT in the documented json_fields table for Place GTT Order (prevprd belongs to Product Conversion on the previous page) - reproduced verbatim from the source, flagged as a likely copy/paste artifact rather than added to json_fields.
- The success 'stat' reads "Oi created" verbatim (appears to be a typo/OCR artifact for an order/alert-created message); on success request_time and al_id are present; on error emsg is present (Invalid Input or Session Expired).
- Alert-id casing differs between the response-fields table (al_id) and the sample success JSON ("Al_id").
issues:
- The success "stat":"Oi created" string is verbatim from the source but looks like a typo/OCR artifact (likely an order/alert-created message); preserved as-is.
- 'prctyp' has no description cell in the source table (confirmed via the page-31 image), so its description is left empty.
- The 'stat' response field has no Possible value cell in the Place GTT Order response table (unlike the Product Conversion response on page 30); corrected to empty (the draft had carried over an 'Ok / Not_Ok' value).
- The sample curl contains "prevprd": "C", which is not a documented Place GTT Order field (carried over from the preceding Product Conversion section) - reproduced verbatim and flagged, not added to json_fields.
- Minor casing inconsistency for the alert id field (al_id vs Al_id) between the response table and the sample JSON.
